items.quote: An incredible creative partner. He translated our "can it sound like this?" into something that really sounded like this. I would absolutely recommend Jared for any project.
items.name: Kyle von Hoetzendorff

items.quote: I'm very impressed by his full range of skills. He can do it all, from great songwriting to tracking the full spectrum of instruments to mixing. He's prolific across Americana, reggae, rock, EDM, you name it.
items.name: Nick Hexum

items.quote: Jared is a tremendous visionary. His songwriting and arrangement capabilities are top notch. He's on his way to being unstoppable as a producer and songwriter.
items.name: Thomas Jack
